segments.text: Just pulled off an incredible 12th place finish!
segments.original_text: 12位というね素晴らしい成績を収めたばかり

segments.text: It's been a while since a major tournament like this, but...
segments.original_text: 久々のこの大対戦会というところですがまたは

full_text: Just pulled off an incredible 12th place finish! It's been a while since a major tournament like this, but...
